title: Air travellers security charge program account - Canada.ca
content:
## Air travellers security charge program account
This program account is used for the administration of the Air Travellers Security Charge Act . The Air Travellers Security Charge (ATSC) is collected by registered air carriers and their agents when a client purchases an airline ticket. Air carriers are responsible for collecting and remitting the security charge.

## Who needs to register
You need to register for the ATSC program account if your services include both:
- transportation to individuals on an aircraft with a maximum certified take-off weight greater than 2,730 kilograms
- chargeable enplanements
Air transportation services include:
- flights from listed airports in Canada to other listed airports
- international flights

## How to register and file
If you provide such air transportation services, you must fill in Form B248 , Registration Form Under the Provisions of the Air Travellers Security Charge Act , and send it to:
Prince Edward Island Tax Centre/Tax Services Office 275 Pope Road Summerside PE  C1N 6A2
You need a business number (BN) to register for an ATSC program account.
Learn how to get a BN: How to register your business
You must file Form B249 , Air Travellers Security Charge Return , every month. You can file semi-annually if the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) approved you. For information on how to file this return online, go to Digital services for businesses .
For more information, go to Air travellers security charge technical information .

## Who to contact for more information
If you have registration or account-related questions, you can call the CRA from anywhere in Canada or the United States at 1-877-432-5472 . You can call the CRA from other countries at 1-613-221-3073 (the CRA accepts collect calls).
If you have technical questions, call 1-866-330-3304 .
- Excise taxes and other levies technical information

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
